pages.text: Meditation now needs an active cultivation method. Without a method, you can still meditate, but cultivation progress will not increase.$(br2)Right-click a method book to activate it.

$(br)Each method has a cultivation limit. Basic Breathing Method and Clear Heart Method stop giving progress after Foundation Establishment Late.$(br2)Method tiers are: Mortal, Yellow, Mysterious, Earth, Heaven, and Immortal.
$(br)Element methods match spirit roots. A strong match can improve speed, power, and cost. A weak match is usable but weaker. A mismatch is very poor or may fail in later methods.

$(br)Reincarnation True Art: dark, heaven tier, limit Soul Transformation Late.$(br)This method automatically grants Absorb, a projectile spell that steals cultivation progress from lower-level players.

$(br)Heaven Devouring Demon Art: dark, heaven tier, limit Soul Transformation Late.$(br)This method automatically grants Devour Heaven, which consumes blocks and slain life into fast cultivation progress.
$(br)Void Breaking Art: wind, earth tier, limit Golden Core Late.$(br)Automatically grants Wind Pressure, a toggle spell that lets punches carve blocks in an air cone.
$(br)Evergreen Art: water/earth, earth tier, limit Golden Core Late.$(br)Passively grows nearby plants without creating tall grass.

$(br)Heaven Burning Life Renewal Art: fire, earth tier, limit Golden Core Late.$(br)First death becomes a 1-minute spectator rebirth state with a fiery trail, then returns to survival with 1 heart. The charge resets at full health.

$(br)Cold Cry Ice-Seizing Art: ice, heaven tier, limit Soul Transformation Late.$(br)Turns qi into extreme cold yin qi. Method proficiency unlocks its personal spells: Minor grants Cold Crystal Lock Claw, Great grants Frost Heaven Cry, and Perfected grants Frost-Shattering Skyglide.
